channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Prep roundup: Bellarmine and St. Francis go 12 innings, College Park senior throws no-hitter in Burlingame
item.description: A no-hitter, a big game between Bellarmine and St. Francis, and several other intriguing results in the Bay Area high school ranks highlighted a big day of prep softball and baseball across the Bay.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Oddsmaker gives insight into how bettors have fared with mostly upset-free March Madness
item.description: With this year's March Madness tournament lacking major upsets, an oddsmaker provided Fox News Digital insight into how bettors have fared.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cleveland's José Ramírez hits 3 homers and claims another piece of Guardians history
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — José Ramírez blasted three homers and carried the Guardians to a victory Friday night. The veteran slugger claimed another place in Cleveland baseball history in the process.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Strong, Fudd help UConn blow out UCLA 85-51 in Final Four as Bueckers moves 1 win from elusive title
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Sarah Strong and Azzi Fudd didn’t even need much help from superstar Paige Bueckers to propel UConn into the national title game, leading the Huskies to a remarkably easy 85-51 victory over UCLA on Friday night in the Final Four of the women’s NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Defending national champion South Carolina returns to title game with 74-57 rout of Texas
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Dawn Staley has never lost a national championship game in three trips as South Carolina's coach. Part of the key to winning those decisive games? Forgetting about what happened the last time she was there. And this time, that was only a year ago.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alex Ovechkin ties Wayne Gretzky's NHL record with his 894th goal
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Alex Ovechkin skated over to his son Sergei at the glass. He bowed to Wayne Gretzky standing in a suite. He blew kisses to his wife, mother and family on the other side of the arena.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Celtics set NBA record for 3-pointers in a season, passing Warriors' mark from 2022-23
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — The Boston Celtics' season started with a record-tying 3-point night. It was a sign of things to come. The Celtics broke the NBA record for 3-pointers in a season Friday night in a victory over the Phoenix Suns. “We've got a really good team," star Jayson Tatum said.
item.dc:creator: BY KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Green scores 34 as Rockets snap Thunder's 11-game winning streak with 125-111 victory
item.description: Jalen Green had 34 points, Alperen Sengun added 31 and the Houston Rockets snapped the Oklahoma City Thunder’s 11-game winning streak with a 125-111 victory Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Soto at home in Polar Bear's house: Big bats power Mets in `storybook' Citi Field opener
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Juan Soto's home debut with the New York Mets was a huge success. Citi Field is still Pete Alonso's house, though.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alex Ovechkin ties Wayne Gretzky's all-time NHL goal record
item.description: Alex Ovechkin is now one goal away from surpassing Wayne Gretzky as the NHL's all-time leading goal scorer. Ovechkin tied the "Great One" Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: USC star JuJu Watkins is the AP Player of the Year and just the fourth sophomore to earn that honor
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — JuJu Watkins, the sensational sophomore who led Southern California to its best season in nearly 40 years, was honored Thursday as The Associated Press women’s basketball Player of the Year.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kings score three times in third period to beat Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club's playoff chances are growing slimmer with each loss, and it looks like it's going to take a miraculous turn of events to get in now.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Trevor Lewis excited to be back in Utah for NHL game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah native Trevor Lewis has played a few preseason games in Salt Lake City, but never a regular season game. So as he returns to his home state to play against the Utah Hockey Club with the Los Angeles Kings tonight, he couldn't be more excited.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jon Scheyer, a Chicagoland prep basketball legend, going for 3rd national title with Duke
item.description: Jon Scheyer is two victories shy of winning his third NCAA Division I national championship with the storied Duke men's basketball program: one as a player, one as an assistant coach, and — with wins in San Antonio on Saturday and Monday — one as a head coach.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: How Mesa Juniors Volleyball Club brought home Gold in Las Vegas
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Once high school volleyball season ends, several local high school athletes from all across the Western Slope come together to compete at the club level for the Mesa Juniors Volleyball Club.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Baseball: Granite Hills 4, San Marcos 4
item.description: SAN MARCOS(KUSI)- Spring break baseball at the yard on Tuesday afternoon in the North County with this one ending in a 4-4 tie.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Kyle Tucker continues home run streak, Cubs top A's for 1st back-to-back wins of 2025 season
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — Just one more game, then the Cubs will finally get to play at Wrigley Field. And they're aiming to return home on a three-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Pepperdine golfers overcome wildfires to compete in Augusta
item.description: Jeneath Wong and Eunseo Choi, two golfers from Pepperdine University, have arrived in Augusta, Georgia for the Augusta National Women's Amateur, after narrowly avoiding the recent Malibu wildfires that ravaged their campus in California.
item.dc:creator: Barclay Bishop, Fox 5

item.title: Caleb Williams' development, Bears search for "weapons" and Kyler Gordon's contract extension with The Athletic's Kevin Fishbain
item.description: The Chicago Bears are looking to develop Caleb Williams and use their top draft picks to bolster their offense, while also focusing on adding a dynamic running back and working on a contract extension for Kyler Gordon.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Investigation into death of former Yankees player's son turns to carbon monoxide: reports
item.description: Investigators in Costa Rica say carbon monoxide may instead be to blame for the death of Miller Gardner, the 14-year-old son of former Yankees outfielder Brett Gardner.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: New Mexico taps UC San Diego's Eric Olen to replace Richard Pitino
item.description: New Mexico hired UC San Diego's Eric Olen on Sunday as its next basketball coach. Olen will replace Richard Pitino, who left to become Xavier's coach on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: RSL gets shut out again at Minnesota United, 2-0
item.description: ST. PAUL (ABC4 Sports) - For the second straight game, and third overall this MLS season, Real Salt Lake failed to score a goal in a 2-0 shutout at Minnesota United Saturday night. Tani Oluwaseyi recorded a brace to help Minnesota United hand Real Salt Lake its fourth loss of the season. Dayne St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USC shakes off JuJu Watkins' absence and beats Kansas State 67-61 in March Madness
item.description: Kennedy Smith stepped into the void left by injured star JuJu Watkins, scoring 19 points to help Southern California hold off Kansas State 67-61 in the Sweet 16 of the women's NCAA Tournament on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5
